creator: spamtrap@null.net
text:
Damjan Jovanovic can you please revive this and attempt to complete RFC 4787 req 1 and 3 implementation patch for pf. This would be a huge benefit to FreeBSD pf in general as well as allowing software such as miniupnpd to work properly. Currently, there is no means to avoid a symmetric NAT using pf that I know of. This is has caused signifcant issues with gamers who use pfSense and OPNsense. For example, the possibly to use 2 Xbox's at the same time playing the same game is plagued with issues and essentially impossible.

Linux is able to establish full cone NAT. This is why the vast majority of consumer routers that use Linux have no issues with playing the same game at the same time on the same type of consoles.

Damjan can you add any feedback to this. Thank you.
